sentences.target: Ich hebe schnell Geld am Bankomaten ab.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈheːbə ʃnɛl ɡɛlt am baŋkoˈmaːtən ap./

translations.de: Ich hebe schnell Geld am Bankomaten ab.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈheːbə ʃnɛl ɡɛlt am baŋkoˈmaːtən ap./
translations.en: I'm quickly withdrawing cash at the ATM.
translations.es: Estoy retirando efectivo rápidamente del cajero automático.
translations.fr: Je retire rapidement de l'argent au distributeur.
translations.it: Sto prelevando contanti velocemente al bancomat.
translations.yue: 我喺提款機度快手提款。
translations.ru: Я быстро снимаю наличные в банкомате.
translations.pt: Estou sacando dinheiro rapidamente no caixa eletrônico.
translations.vi: Tôi đang rút tiền mặt nhanh ở cây ATM.
translations.ar: أنا أسحب نقودًا بسرعة من الصراف الآلي.
translations.nl: Ik haal snel contant geld uit de geldautomaat.
translations.uk: Я швидко знімаю готівку в банкоматі.
translations.hu: Gyorsan veszek fel készpénzt az automatából.
translations.hi: मैं एटीएम से जल्दी नकद निकाल रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βγάζω γρήγορα μετρητά από το ΑΤΜ.
translations.nb: Jeg tar raskt ut kontanter i minibanken.
translations.id: Saya sedang menarik uang tunai dengan cepat di ATM.
translations.sv: Jag tar snabbt ut kontanter i bankomaten.
translations.ro: Scot rapid numerar de la bancomat.
translations.da: Jeg hæver hurtigt kontanter i hæveautomaten.
translations.ja: ATMで素早く現金を引き出しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present; part of the separable verb abheben with particle 'ab' at clause end.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb phrase.
Common noun; accusative direct object of the verb (what is being withdrawn).
Contraction of the preposition 'an' + definite article 'dem'; governs dative and introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun; masculine dative singular as the object of the preposition 'an' (in 'am Bankomaten').
Separable verbal particle; combines with 'hebe' to form the verb abheben (‘to withdraw’).

sentences.target: Der Bankomat nimmt meine Karte nicht an.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ baŋkoˈmaːt nɪmt ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈkaʁtə nɪçt an./

translations.de: Der Bankomat nimmt meine Karte nicht an.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ baŋkoˈmaːt nɪmt ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈkaʁtə nɪçt an./
translations.en: The ATM doesn't accept my card.
translations.es: El cajero automático no acepta mi tarjeta.
translations.fr: Le distributeur n'accepte pas ma carte.
translations.it: Il bancomat non accetta la mia carta.
translations.zh-Hans: 自动取款机不接受我的卡。
translations.pt: O caixa eletrônico não aceita meu cartão.
translations.he: הכספומט לא מקבל את הכרטיס שלי.
translations.vi: Máy ATM không chấp nhận thẻ của tôi.
translations.nl: De geldautomaat accepteert mijn pas niet.
translations.hu: Az automata nem fogadja el a kártyámat.
translations.hi: एटीएम मेरा कार्ड स्वीकार नहीं कर रहा है.
translations.el: Το ΑΤΜ δεν δέχεται την κάρτα μου.
translations.ja: ATMが私のカードを受け付けません。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular determiner for 'Bankomat'.
Common noun; nominative masculine singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; used with separable particle 'an' to form annehmen (‘to accept’).
Possessive determiner; feminine accusative singular, agreeing with 'Karte'.
Common noun; accusative feminine singular; direct object of the verb.
Negation particle; negates the predicate ('nimmt ... an').
Separable verbal particle; combines with 'nimmt' to form annehmen (‘to accept’).

sentences.target: Wir treffen uns gleich beim Bankomaten.

translations.de: Wir treffen uns gleich beim Bankomaten.
translations.en: We'll meet at the ATM shortly.
translations.es: Nos vemos en el cajero automático en un momento.
translations.fr: On se retrouve au distributeur dans un instant.
translations.it: Ci vediamo tra poco al bancomat.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们一会儿在自动取款机见。
translations.yue: 我哋陣間喺提款機度見。
translations.pt: A gente se encontra no caixa eletrônico daqui a poco.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ gặp nhau ở cây ATM một lát nữa.
translations.ar: سنلتقي عند الصراف الآلي بعد قليل.
translations.nl: We zien elkaar zo bij de geldautomaat.
translations.hi: हम थोड़ी देर में एटीएम पर मिलेंगे.
translations.pl: Spotkamy się za chwilę przy bankomacie.
translations.el: Θα συναντηθούμε σε λίγο στο ΑΤΜ.
translations.id: Kita akan bertemu di ATM sebentar lagi.
translations.ro: Ne vedem în curând la bancomat.
translations.cs: Sejdeme se za chvilku u bankomatu.
translations.da: Vi mødes om lidt ved hæveautomaten.
translations.ja: もうすぐATMのところで会います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person plural present; used with reflexive/reciprocal pronoun 'uns' to mean ‘to meet (each other)’.
Personal pronoun; 1st person plural accusative, reflexive/reciprocal object of 'treffen'.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘right away/soon’; modifies the clause.
Contraction of the preposition 'bei' + definite article 'dem'; governs dative and introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun; masculine dative singular as the object of 'bei' (in 'beim Bankomaten').

sentences.target: Vor dem Bankomaten steht eine lange Schlange.
sentences.reading: /foːɐ̯ deːm baŋkoˈmaːtən ʃteːt ˈaɪ̯nə ˈlaŋə ˈʃlaŋə./

translations.de: Vor dem Bankomaten steht eine lange Schlange.
translations.ipa: /foːɐ̯ deːm baŋkoˈmaːtən ʃteːt ˈaɪ̯nə ˈlaŋə ˈʃlaŋə./
translations.en: There's a long line in front of the ATM.
translations.es: Hay una fila larga frente al cajero automático.
translations.fr: Il y a une longue file devant le distributeur.
translations.it: C'è una lunga fila davanti al bancomat.
translations.ko: ATM 앞에 긴 줄이 서 있어요.
translations.yue: 提款機前面有條好長嘅人龍。
translations.pt: Há uma fila longa na frente do caixa eletrônico.
translations.tr: ATM'nin önünde uzun bir kuyruk var.
translations.vi: Có một hàng dài trước máy ATM.
translations.ar: هناك طابور طويل أمام الصراف الآلي.
translations.nl: Er staat eine lange rij voor de geldautomaat.
translations.hu: Hosszú sor áll a bankautomata előtt.
translations.hi: एटीएम के सामने लंबी कतार लगी है.
translations.el: Μπροστά στο ΑΤΜ υπάρχει μεγάλη ουρά.
translations.nb: Det er en lang kø foran minibanken.
translations.id: Ada antrean panjang di depan ATM.
translations.sv: Det är en lång kö framför bankomaten.
translations.ro: Este o coadă lungă în fața bancomatului.
translations.da: Der er en lang kø foran hæveautomaten.
translations.ja: ATMの前に長い行列ができている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; with static location it governs the dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article; dative masculine singular determiner for 'Bankomaten'.
Common noun; masculine dative singular as the object of the preposition 'vor'.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; intransitive predicate of the clause.
Indefinite article; feminine nominative singular determiner for 'Schlange'.
Attributive adjective; feminine nominative singular form modifying 'Schlange'.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the sentence.
